name: Decodable
description: Decodable — Managed stream processing platform built on Apache Flink for real-time data pipeline transformation.

seo.title: Decodable — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Decodable: Decodable — Managed stream processing platform built on Apache Flink for real-time data pipeline transformation.

when_to_use: Managed Apache Flink stream processing without cluster ops
Real-time ETL transformations on Kafka data streams
Enriching events with reference data from REST APIs in pipelines
Streaming analytics without writing Java or Scala Flink code
Low-latency data transformations with visual SQL pipeline editor

pros: SQL-first streaming lowers barrier to entry
CDC sources and sinks work out of the box
Serverless pricing model for sporadic workloads
cons: Flink semantics still leak through in edge cases
Smaller vendor than Confluent Cloud competitors
Pricing can surprise under bursty workloads
review.verdict: Best way to run Flink without DevOps pain, though Confluent remains the default for streaming.
review.best_for: Data teams wanting managed Flink streaming without Kubernetes operations
review.not_for: Teams standardized on Kafka Streams or ksqlDB within Confluent

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
